title: %Error: Internal Error: ...v:60: ../V3SymTable.h:60: Inserting two symbols with same name: v__DOT__...

features.name: inout port with parameterizable range expression
features.description: Code should include an inout port declaration using a parameterizable range expression like [8-1:0] instead of a simple constant range

features.name: generate if-else with shared inout signal connection
features.description: Code should include a generate if-else block where the same inout signal is connected to different submodule instances in each branch
features.snippet:
generate
  if (FAST_SIM_MODEL) begin
    dqs2_abstract dqs2_inst (.read_write_data_io(read_write_data_io));
  end else begin
    dqs2 dqs2_inst (.read_write_data_io(read_write_data_io));
  end
endgenerate

features.name: duplicate symbol insertion in symbol table
features.description: Code should include constructs that cause Verilator to attempt inserting two symbols with the same hierarchical name into the symbol table
